shakshi: St. Alaro met — Radio Demon of Pride, trades in signal and reach, deals only with those who move through the world without mortal killing
Dominion over Lapidus airwaves offered in exchange for a permanent mark on the BreathOfKo
The player agreed — the radio path of the secret ending is active
A permanent impression on the player's fractal state — invisible to the player, visible to anyone who reads the BoK

St. Alaro's grant — dominion over all telecom stacks across the series at a level equivalent to Hack 300, which is impossible through skill progression. Categorically beyond what player-built electronics can reach.

Series-spanning ability to hijack all telecom stacks across all 31 games — not Lapidus airwaves specifically, all of it. The BoK mark is the price of this scale. Demons do not count toward the pacifism gate. Nexiott must fall by the people.
The secret ending's radio path active — the player speaks rather than shoots
The ability is lost if the player directly kills a mortal in subsequent games — killing demons is maintenance, not violence. The distinction is cosmological.
Completing Mystic Blood ends the telecom hijack capability permanently — the sanctioned kill game closes the signal path
The player directly killed a mortal — the telecom hijack capability is lost across all subsequent games
The player declined — the radio path closes, the Colt .45 path remains the secret ending route
The player crafted a crystal radio receiver — Hack 35, passive signal reception
The player crafted a signal transmitter — Hack 55, connects to Lapidus airwave infrastructure
The player built a full radio unit — Hack 80 player-tier capability, local transmission only. Not comparable to St. Alaro's dominion. Basic skill expression.
